title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 105.260 - Certain laws to apply to St. Louis
text:
105.260.  Certain laws to apply to St. Louis. — All laws requiring any officer of any county to perform any duty, service, or trust under the laws of this state shall include all corresponding city officers named in the charter and scheme of separation for the government of the city and county of St. Louis.
(RSMo 1939 § 15745) 
Prior revision: 1929 § 14797 
City of St. Louis to be included in term "county", when, 1.080
